title: taraxacum pseudohoppeanum
intro: Taraxacum pseudohoppeanum, also known as the Yellow Dandelion or False Hop Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudohoppeanum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and support liver function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used in salads or as a cooked green.
